description: The Mercedes-AMG E63, produced from 2006, is the ultimate super saloon from Mercedes. The W212 generation with its naturally aspirated 6.2-litre V8 is the purist's choice, while the W213's 4.0-litre twin-turbo V8 delivers 571-612 bhp with all-wheel drive. The E63 S Estate is the definitive Q-car.
